title: DataConnector - Metadata API
description: Represents the white-labeled metadata configuration for an external connector in Data 360.

attributes.description: A list of configurable attributes for the data connector.

description.description: The description of the data connector.

errors.description: A list of error messages or codes related to the connector’s behavior or configuration validation.

features.description: A list of features supported by the data connector. Values are: Override

icon.description: A static resource in SVG format with dimensions of 100x100 pixels and a file size not exceeding 100 KB.

licenseAgreement.description: Text of the license agreement associated with the data connector.

masterLabel.description: The display label of the connector used in user interface (UI).

ownerLocation.description: A description or URL that specifies where the connector is maintained or hosted.

ownerLogo.description: A static resource in SVG format with dimensions of 100x100 pixels and a file size not exceeding 100 KB.

ownerName.description: The name of the organization that owns the connector.

parentConnector.description: The API name of the connector. For example, AwsS3, SNOWFLAKE, ICEBERG, and so on.

releaseLevel.description: Indicates the connector’s lifecycle stage.Values are: BETA GA IN_DEV PILOT

supportEmail.description: The support email address users can contact for help with the connector.

supportMessage.description: A support-related message or instruction displayed.

supportPhone.description: The support phone number users can call for help with the connector.

translations.description: A list of localized labels and descriptions to support multiple languages in the UI.

capabilities.description: A list of supported capabilities for the data connector.Values are: DataIn DataInDelete DataInHeader DataInIncremental DataInSelector DataInStructured DataInUnstructured DataOut Hidden UniqueGroup ZeroCopyIn

command.description: The command string executed during data operations, such as import or sync.

commandAttributes.description: A list of attributes passed with the command.

dataType.description: Specifies the type of data input expected.Values are: CHECKBOX COMBOBOX DATE DATETIME EMAIL IDP NAMED_CREDENTIAL NUMBER PASSWORD PASSWORD_FILE PRIVATE_NETWORK_ROUTE RADIO RADIO_BUTTONS TEXT TEXTAREA TIME TOGGLE

defaultValue.description: The default value assigned to the field if no user input is provided.

editable.description: Indicates whether the field value can be modified by the user.

externalName.description: The unique name used to reference the connector externally, such as in API calls.

masterLabel.description: The label used for display in the UI.

max.description: The maximum allowable value or length for the field.

min.description: The minimum allowable value or length for the field.

options.description: A list of selectable options available for the field.

order.description: The display order or evaluation order of the field.

pattern.description: The validation pattern used to ensure input follows a defined format.

placeholder.description: The placeholder text displayed in the input field when empty.

readonly.description: Indicates whether the field is read-only.

required.description: Indicates whether the field must have a value.

secure.description: Indicates whether the field contains sensitive data and should be masked.

tooltip.description: The tooltip text shown to users for additional guidance.

translations.description: A list of localized labels and descriptions for use in different languages.

validationMessageError.description: The error message shown when input validation fails for this field.

capabilities.description: A list of capabilities supported by the data connector.Values are: DataIn DataInDelete DataInHeader DataInIncremental DataInSelector DataInStructured DataInUnstructured DataOut Hidden UniqueGroup ZeroCopyIn

conditionAttributes.description: A list of attributes used to define conditions in the connector configuration.

externalName.description: The unique name used to reference the connector externally, such as in API calls.

masterLabel.description: The display label for the connector used in the UI.

order.description: The order or priority of the connector in processing context.

translations.description: A list of localized labels and descriptions for use in different languages.

externalName.description: The unique name used to reference the object externally, such as in API calls. Must be unique across the namespace.

masterLabel.description: The label displayed in the UI.

translations.description: A list of localized labels and descriptions for use in different languages.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="DataConnector">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="attributes" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:DataConnectorAttribute"/>
        <xsd:element name="description" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="errors" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:DataConnectorError"/>
        <xsd:element name="features" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:DataConnectorFeature"/>
        <xsd:element name="icon" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="licenseAgreement" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="ownerLocation" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="ownerLogo" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="ownerName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="parentConnector" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="releaseLevel" type="tns:DataConnectorReleaseLevel"/>
        <xsd:element name="supportEmail" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="supportMessage" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="supportPhone" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="translations" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:LocalizedValue"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="DataConnectorAttribute">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="capabilities" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:DataConnectorCapability"/>
        <xsd:element name="command" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="commandAttributes" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="dataType" type="tns:DataConnectorDataType"/>
        <xsd:element name="defaultValue" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="editable" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="externalName" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="max" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="min" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="options" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:DataConnectorAttributeOpt"/>
        <xsd:element name="order" type="xsd:int"/>
        <xsd:element name="pattern" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="placeholder" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="readonly" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="required" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="secure" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="tooltip" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="translations" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:LocalizedValue"/>
        <xsd:element name="validationMessageError" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="DataConnectorAttributeOpt">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="capabilities" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:DataConnectorCapability"/>
        <xsd:element name="conditionAttributes" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="externalName" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="order" type="xsd:int"/>
        <xsd:element name="translations" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:LocalizedValue"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="DataConnectorCapability">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Hidden"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataIn"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataInStructured"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataInUnstructured"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataOut"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ZeroCopyIn"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="UniqueGroup"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataInHeader"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataInSelector"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataInIncremental"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataInDelete"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:simpleType name="DataConnectorDataType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="CHECKBOX"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="COMBOBOX"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="RADIO"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="RADIO_BUTTONS"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DATE"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DATETIME"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="TIME"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="EMAIL"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="PASSWORD"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="PASSWORD_FILE"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="NUMBER"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="TEXT"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="TEXTAREA"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="NAMED_CREDENTIAL"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="IDP"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="TOGGLE"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="PRIVATE_NETWORK_ROUTE"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="DataConnectorError">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="externalName" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="translations" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:LocalizedValue"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="DataConnectorFeature">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Hidden"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataIn"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataInStructured"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataInUnstructured"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataOut"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ZeroCopyIn"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DataInFrequentIngest"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="FileBased"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="FileBasedDataSync"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ObjectBased"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Streaming"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="StaticSchema"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ReadonlyConnection"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Override"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:simpleType name="DataConnectorReleaseLevel">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="IN_DEV"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="PILOT"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="BETA"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="GA"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="LocalizedValue">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="aspect" minOccurs="0" type="tns:TranslationAspect"/>
    <xsd:element name="language" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="outOfDate" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
    <xsd:element name="value" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="TranslationAspect">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Master"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="RelationshipLabel"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Description"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Help"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="NameFieldLabel"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ErrorMessage"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="InfoMessage"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="PausedText"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="InputLabel"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="NextOrFinishLabel"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="BackLabel"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="PauseLabel"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="FirstName"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="LastName"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="MiddleName"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Salutation"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Suffix"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="InformalName"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Title"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Phone"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Email"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Address"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Street"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="City"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="State"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="StateCode"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="PostalCode"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Country"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="CountryCode"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Latitude"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Longitude"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Body"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Summary"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Url"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ActionButtonLink"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ActionButtonLabel"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DismissButtonLabel"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Header"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="VideoLink"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ImageAltText"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ImageLink"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Custom"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="DefaultValue"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Version"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="AttributeName"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="UsageType"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ProcessName"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="GroupName"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Label"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ParameterValue"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
```

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a DataConnector component.
declarative_metadata_sample_definition.code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<DataConnector xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata">
    <masterLabel>Iceberg Override</masterLabel>
    <icon>Salesforce</icon>
    <parentConnector>ICEBERG</parentConnector>
    <releaseLevel>BETA</releaseLevel>
    <description>Connect to Apache Iceberg tables</description>
    <features>Override</features>
    <ownerName>Slack</ownerName>
    <ownerLogo>Salesforce</ownerLogo>
    <ownerLocation>Settle, USA</ownerLocation>
    <supportMessage>Click download logs before reachout</supportMessage>
    <supportPhone>+15788467513</supportPhone>
    <licenseAgreement>https://www.salesforce.com/company/legal</licenseAgreement>
    <attributes>
        <fullName>IcebergOverride_storageSourceType</fullName>
        <externalName>storageSourceType</externalName>
        <masterLabel>Storage Type</masterLabel>
        <dataType>COMBOBOX</dataType>
        <defaultValue>CATALOG_PROVIDED</defaultValue>
        <capabilities>DataIn</capabilities>
        <capabilities>Hidden</capabilities>
        <order>20</order>
        <editable>true</editable>
        <required>true</required>
        <secure>true</secure>
    </attributes>
</DataConnector>
